title: Graphorkis bicolor
taxonomy: Graphorkis bicolor is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid, often found growing in shade and humid environments. The plant's classification is within the subtribe Orchidinae and tribe Cranichideae. Graphorkis bicolor is native to tropical Africa, where it can be found in various countries including South Africa, Mozambique, and Kenya. The specific classification of the plant is further detailed at the genus and species levels.
